description: Phase 4 chunk 3 prep baseline на legacy InteractiveFamilyTree (mine view). Synthetic linear chain fixtures.
methodology: Mean of 3 measurement runs per fixture size. Single-run variance σ ≈ 15% (widget-test environment noise); mean of 3 даёт σ/√3 ≈ 8.7%, устойчиво держа 10% regression threshold ниже noise ceiling. Per Артёмов methodology refinement 2026-05-12.
notes: Numbers — widget-test environment first-pumpWidget durations, не real-device frame timings. Используются как regression early-warning baseline. Chunk 3 implementation должен оставаться within 10% от baseline на mine view при feature-flag OFF. Shape sensitivity (wide-balanced vs linear-chain) — defer'нут на chunk 3.5 follow-up.
